title: Dua and Amaal for 2nd of the month of Ramadan

duas.title: Salaat / Namaaz for 2nd eve
duas.description:
Amaal for night preceding 2nd of Ramadan
FOUR RAKAAT: Surah al-Fatihah once and Surah al-Qadr twenty times(inna anzalna)

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ قَرّبْنِي فِيهِ إِلَى مَرْضَاتِكَ،
segments.translation: O Allah: on this day, (please) take me near Your pleasure,

segments.arabic: وَجَنّبْنِي فِيهِ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَنَقِمَاتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wa jannibny fihi min sakhatika wa naqimatika
segments.translation: And (please) keep me away on it from Your wrath and punishments,

segments.arabic: وَوَفّقْنِي فِيهِ لِقِرَاءَةِ آيَاتِكَ،
segments.translation: And (please) make me succeed in reciting Your verses,

segments.arabic: بِرَحْمَتِكَ يَاأَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.translation: By Your mercy; O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

duas.title: Holy Prophet's Dua - Day 2
duas.description: On the authority of the Prophet(sawa), from Iqbal Aamal for 2nd day of Ramadan

segments.arabic: يَا إِلَهَ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَ الْآخِرِينَ وَ إِلَهَ مَنْ بَقِيَ وَ إِلَهَ مَنْ مَضَى
segments.translation: O God of the first and the last generations. Lord of what remains, and Lord of what has gone

segments.arabic: رَبَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ السَّبْعِ وَ مَنْ فِيهِنَّ
segments.translation: Lord of the seven heavens and whatever is within them!

segments.arabic: فَالِقَ الْإِصْبَاحِ وَ جَاعِلَ اللَّيْلِ‌ سَكَناً وَ الشَّمْسَ وَ الْقَمَرَ حُسْباناً
segments.translation: O the Cleaver of the dawn who made the night for rest, and the sun and moon for calculation of time

segments.arabic: لَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَ لَكَ الشُّكْرُ وَ لَكَ الْمَنُّ وَ لَكَ الطَّوْلُ
segments.translation: To You belongs all Praise and Gratitude. To You belong Favors! To You belong Bestowals!

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ الْوَاحِدُ الصَّمَدُ
segments.translation: And You are the Only! O Eternal, Absolute!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِجَلَالِكَ سَيِّدِي وَ جَمَالِكَ مَوْلَايَ
segments.translation: O my Master! I ask You by Your Might and Beauty

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي وَ تَرْحَمَنِي وَ تَتَجَاوَزَ عَنِّي
segments.translation: I ask You to bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny. Forgive me and have mercy on me and overlook my faults

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ الْغَفُورُ الرَّحِيمُ.
segments.translation: as You are All-Forgiving, Merciful!

duas.title: Dua - Muhammad ibn Abi Qarrih
duas.description: The following supplications for the second night are reported from A‟mal-i-Shahr-i- Ramadhan by Abi Qarrih:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الرَّبُّ وَ أَنَا الْعَبْدُ قَضَيْتَ عَلَى نَفْسِكَ الرَّحْمَةَ وَ دَلَلْتَنِي
segments.translation: O my God! You are the Lord and I am the servant! You have decreed Mercy on Yourself, and have directed me towards it.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ الصَّادِقُ الْبَارُّ يَدَاكَ مَبْسُوطَتَانِ تُنْفِقُ كَيْفَ تَشَاءُ
segments.translation: And You are honest and righteous. Your hands are extended and You bestow in any way that You wish

segments.arabic: لَا يُلْحِفُكَ سَائِلٌ وَ لَا يَنْقُصُكَ نَائِلٌ وَ لَا يَزِيدُكَ كَثْرَةُ السُّؤَالِ إِلَّا عَطَاءً وَ جُوداً
segments.translation: You are He who is not troubled by those who ask and nothing is lessened from You when You reward. The extent of demands from You does not increase anything but Your Bestowal and Generosity

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ قَلْباً وَجِلًا مِنْ مَخَافَتِكَ أُدْرِكُ بِهِ جَنَّةَ رِضْوَانِكَ
segments.translation: I ask You for a heart frightful of Your Fear with which I may reach the Paradise of Your Pleasure

segments.arabic: وَ أَمْضِي بِهِ فِي سَبِيلِ مَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَ أَرْضَاكَ عَمَلُهُ وَ أَرْضَيْتَهُ فِي ثَوَابِكَ
segments.translation: and follow the way that You like and You are plessed with, and it gets pleased with Your Rewards

segments.arabic: حَتَّى تُبْلِغَنِي بِذَلِكَ ثِقَةُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ بِكَ وَ أَمَانُ الْخَائِفِينَ مِنْكَ
segments.translation: so that with it I may attain the trust of the believers in You, and shelter of those scared of You

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَ مَا أَعْطَيْتَنِي مِنْ عَطَاءٍ فَاجْعَلْهُ شُغُلًا فِيمَا تُحِبُّ
segments.translation: O my God! Please let whatever of Your Gifts which You bestow upon me be as a means of doing what You like

segments.arabic: وَ مَا زَوَيْتَ عَنِّي فَاجْعَلْهُ فَرَاغاً لِي فِيمَا تُحِبُّ
segments.translation: and let whatever You withhold from me be as a means of freedom for me in doing what You like.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ قَصَمْتَ الْجَبَابِرَةَ بِجَبَرُوتِكَ وَ بَسَطْتَ كَفَّكَ عَلَى الْخَلَائِقِ
segments.translation: O my God! You defeated the oppressors with Your Omnipotence, extended Your Hand to the creatures

segments.arabic: وَ أَقْسَمْتَ أَنَّكَ حَيٌّ قَيُّومُ
segments.translation: swore that You are the Living, the Eternal.

segments.arabic: وَ كَذَلِكَ أَنْتَ تَنْقَطِعُ حِيَلَ الْمُبْطِلِينَ وَ مَكْرَهُمْ دُونَكَ
segments.translation: You are so and the tricks and the plots of the wicked are not working against You

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ [وَ آلِهِ‌] وَ ارْزُقْنِي مُوَالاةَ مَنْ وَالَيْتَ وَ مُعَادَاةَ مَنْ عَادَيْتَ
segments.translation: O my God! Please bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny. O God! Please bless me with the friendship of whoever is Your Friend; and animosity with whoever is Your enemy

segments.arabic: وَ حُبّاً لِمَنْ أَحْبَبْتَ وَ بُغْضاً لِمَنْ أَبْغَضْتَ حَتَّى لَا أُوَالِي لَكَ عَدُوّاً وَ لَا أُعَادِي لَكَ وَلِيّاً
segments.translation: love for whoever loves You; and despise for whoever despises You so that I never become friends with Your enemies, or become the enemy of Your Friends

segments.arabic: أَشْكُو إِلَيْكَ يَا رَبِّ خَطِيئَةً أَغْشَتْ بَصَرِي وَ أَظَلَّتْ عَلَى قَلْبِي وَ فِي‌ طَرِيقِ الْخَاطِئِينَ صَرَعَتْنِي
segments.translation: O Lord! I complain to You about offenses that blocked my sight, darkened my heart, and threw me in the path of the wrongdoers

segments.arabic: فَهَذِهِ يَدِي رَهِينَةٌ فِي وَثَاقِكَ بِمَا جَنَيْتُ عَلَى نَفْسِي
segments.translation: These are my two hands that are in Your Chains since I have oppressed myself

segments.arabic: وَ هَذِهِ رِجْلِي مُوثَقَةٌ فِي حِبَالِكَ بِاكْتِسَابِي
segments.translation: and these are my two feet that are in Your Chains for what I have done.

segments.arabic: فَلَوْ كَانَ هَرَبِي إِلَى جَبَلٍ يُلْجِئُنِي أَوْ مَفَازَةٍ تُوَارِينِي أَوْ بَحْرٍ يُنْجِينِي لَكُنْتُ الْعَائِذَ بِكَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي
segments.translation: If I could run away somewhere to take refuge, or go to a desert where I could hide, or go to the sea where I could be saved, I would certainly take refuge in You from my sins

segments.arabic: َسأْتَعِيذُكَ عِيَاذَةَ مَهْمُومٍ حَزِينٍ كَئِيبٍ يَرْقُبُ نَارَ السَّمُومِ
segments.translation: I take refuge in You like a depressed grievous one who is awaiting the flames of a burning Fire

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ يَا مُجَلِّيَ عَظَائِمِ الْهُمُومِ
segments.translation: O my God! O remover of great griefs. Please remove all my anxieties

segments.arabic: جَلِّ عَنِّي هَمَّةَ الْهُمُومِ وَ أَجِرْنِي مِنْ نَارٍ تَقْصِمُ عِظَامِي وَ تُحْرِقُ أَحْشَائِي وَ تُفَرِّقُ قُوَايَ
segments.translation: Save me from the Fire that shall break my bones, burn my body, and destroy my strength

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ارْزُقْنِي صَبْرَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ اجْعَلْنِي أَنْتَظِرُ أَمْرَهُمْ
segments.translation: O God! Please bless me with the perseverance of the Household of Muhammad (MGB). Please establish me as one of those awaiting their Rule

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَنْصَارِهِمْ وَ أَعْوَانِهِمْ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
segments.translation: Please establish me as their helpers and supporters in this world and the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَحْيِنِي مَحْيَاهُمْ وَ أَمِتْنِي مَيْتَتَهُمْ
segments.translation: Please let me live as one who lives for them, and take away my life as one who dies for them

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِهِمْ سُؤْلَهُمْ فِي وَلِيِّهِمْ وَ عَدُوِّهِمْ
segments.translation: Please grant me what they ask regarding their friends and enemies

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ السَّبْعِ الْمَثَانِي وَ الْقُرْآنِ [وَ الْفُرْقَانِ‌] الْعَظِيمِ وَ رَبَّ جَبْرَئِيلَ وَ مِيكَائِيلَ
segments.translation: O my God! Lord of ‘the Seven Oft-repeated (verses)’ and the Grand Quran, Lord of Gabriel and Michael!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَنْ تَقْبَلَ صَوْمِي وَ صَلَاتِي
segments.translation: I ask You to bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny; and accept my fasting and praying

segments.arabic: Then ask for what you need and say the following:
segments.translation: Then ask for what you need and say the following:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعُوذُ بِكَ فِي هَذَا الشَّهْرِ الْعَظِيمِ مِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ يَحْبِسُ رِزْقِي
segments.translation: O my God! I take refuge in You in this great month from all sins that may restrain my sustenance

segments.arabic: أَوْ يَحْجُبُ مَسْأَلَتِي أَوْ يَبْطُلُ صَوْمِي أَوْ يَصُدُّ بِوَجْهِكَ الْكَرِيمِ عَنِّي
segments.translation: block my asking, or void my fast, or turn Your Noble Face away from me

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ اغْفِرْ لِي مَا لَا يَضُرُّكَ
segments.translation: O my God! Please bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny, please forgive me what would not harm You

segments.arabic: وَ أَعْطِنِي مَا لَا يَنْقُصُكَ فِي هَذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ فَإِنِّي فَقِيرٌ إِلَى رَحْمَتِكَ
segments.translation: Please grant me what would not diminish near You on this night. Verily I am poor and in need of Your Mercy.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِلَيْكَ غَدَوْتُ بِحَاجَتِي وَ بِكَ أَنْزَلْتُ الْيَوْمَ فَقْرِي وَ مَسْكَنَتِي فَإِنِّي لِمَغْفِرَتِكَ وَ رَحْمَتِكَ أَرْجَى مِنِّي لِعَمَلِي وَ مَغْفِرَتُكَ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ أَوْسَعُ لِي مِنْ ذُنُوبِي كُلِّهَا
segments.translation: “O‟ my God! I find myself coming to You for the settlement of my needs. I present my poverty and helplessness to You as I have more hopes in Your Forgiveness and Mercy than my deeds. Your Forgiveness is more extensive than all my sins.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ تَوَلَّ قَضَاءَ كُلِّ حَاجَةٍ لِي بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَيْهَا وَ تَيْسِيرِهَا عَلَيْكَ وَ فَقْرِي إِلَيْكَ
segments.translation: O‟ my God! Please bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny ! Please take charge of fulfilling all my needs by Your Power, and it being easy for You to do so, and by my being in need of You.

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي لَمْ أُصِبْ خَيْراً قَطُّ إِلَّا مِنْكَ وَ لَمْ يَصْرِفْ عَنِّي سُوءً قَطُّ أَحَدٌ غَيْرُكَ وَ لَا أَرْجُو لِأَمْرِ آخِرَتِي وَ دُنْيَايَ سِوَاكَ يَوْمَ يُفْرِدُنِي‌ النَّاسُ فِي حُفْرَتِي وَ أَقْضِي إِلَيْكَ يَا كَرِيمُ
segments.translation: No good has ever reached me from anyone but You. No one but You has ever removed any evil from me. And I have hopes in no one but You regarding the affairs of this world and the Hereafter – The day on which the people leave me alone in my grave and I am delivered to You! O‟ the All-Generous!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ مَنْ تَهَيَّأَ وَ تَعَبَّأَ وَ أَعَدَّ وَ اسْتَعَدَّ لِوِفَادَةٍ إِلَى مَخْلُوقٍ رَجَاءَ رِفْدِهِ وَ طَلَبَ نَائِلِهِ وَ جَائِزَتِهِ
segments.translation: O‟ my God! Many people today try and prepare the grounds to turn to other people hopeful of getting bestowals, gifts and grants.

segments.arabic: فَإِلَيْكَ يَا رَبِّ تَهْيِئَتِي وَ تَعْبِيَتِي وَ اسْتِعْدَادِي رَجَاءَ رِفْدِكَ وَ طَلَبَ نَائِلِكَ وَ جَائِزَتِكَ
segments.translation: O‟ my Master! I decide, try and exert myself, prepare myself and smooth the way, and turn to You hoping to obtain Your Favors, and seeking to attain Your Nobility and Prizes.

segments.arabic: فَلَا تُخَيِّبْ دُعَائِي يَا مَنْ لَا يَخِيبُ عَلَيْهِ السَّائِلُ وَ لَا يَنْقُصُهُ نَائِلٌ فَإِنِّي لَمْ آتِكَ ثِقَةً بِعَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ عَمِلْتُهُ وَ لَا لِوَفَادَةٍ إِلَى مَخْلُوقٍ رَجَوْتُهُ
segments.translation: Please do not fail my supplications. O‟ He from whom nothing is lessened when You Reward. O‟ He who does not send away any destitute disappointed. Surely I have come to You with no good deeds to rely upon, but I never place hopes in other people.

segments.arabic: أَتَيْتُكَ مُقِرّاً بِالْإِسَاءَةِ عَلَى نَفْسِي وَ الظُّلْمِ لَهَا مُعْتَرِفاً بِأَنْ لَا حُجَّةَ لِي وَ لَا عُذْرَ أَتَيْتُكَ أَرْجُو عَظِيمَ عَفْوِكَ الَّذِي عَفَوْتَ بِهِ عَنِ الْخَاطِئِينَ[عَلَوْتَ بِهِ عَلَى الْخَاطِئِينَ‌] [الْخَطَّاءِينَ‌]
segments.translation: I have come to You confessing to my vain desires, and ashamed of my guilt. I have come to You without any excuse or argument hoping for Your Pardon for You are the One who pardons wrongdoers.

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلَى عَظِيمِ الْجُرْمِ أَنْ عُدْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِالرَّحْمَةِ وَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ فَيَا مَنْ رَحْمَتُهُ وَاسِعَةٌ وَ عَفْوُهُ عَظِيمٌ يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ
segments.translation: Even their long persistence in great crimes does not prevent You from returning toward them with Mercy! O‟ He whose Mercy is All-Embracing. And He whose Forgiveness is Great. O Great! O Great!

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ لَيْسَ يَرُدُّ غَضَبَكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَتُكَ وَ حِلْمُكَ وَ لَا يُنْجِي [يُنْجِينِي وَ يُنْجِينِي‌] مِنْ سَخَطِكَ [سخطك‌] إِلَّا التَّضَرُّعُ إِلَيْكَ
segments.translation: O Lord! Nothing but Your Patience can offset Your Wrath and nothing but crying to You can save me from Your Anger.

segments.arabic: فَهَبْ لِي يَا إِلَهِي فَرَجاً بِالْقُدْرَةِ الَّتِي تُحْيِي بِهَا مَيْتَ الْبِلَادِ وَ لَا تُهْلِكْنِي غَمّاً حَتَّى تَسْتَجِيبَ لِي دُعَائِي وَ تُعَرِّفَنِي [تعترفني‌] الْإِجَابَةَ
segments.translation: O‟ my God! Please grant me relief with the Power with which You revive barren ground, and make it fertile and do not make me rush into deadly danger, in frustration until You fulfill my prayers and let me know about its fulfillment.

segments.arabic: وَ أَذِقْنِي طَعْمَ الْعَافِيَةِ إِلَى مُنْتَهَى أَجَلِي
segments.translation: Please let me taste the sweetness of healthiness until the time of my death.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تُشْمِتْ بِي عَدُوِّي وَ لَا تُسَلِّطْهُ عَلَيَّ وَ لَا تُمَكِّنْهُ مِنْ عُنُقِي
segments.translation: Do not subject me to the enemy‟s ridicule and do not subject me to him and do not let him overcome me.

segments.arabic: إِلَهِي إِنْ وَضَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَرْفَعُنِي وَ إِنْ رَفَعْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَضَعُنِي
segments.translation: O‟ my God! If You lower my position no one can raise my position! If You improve my position, no one can lower my position!

segments.arabic: وَ إِنْ أَهْلَكْتَنِي فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ فِي عَبْدِكَ أَوْ يَسْأَلُكَ عَنْ أَمْرِهِ
segments.translation: If You condemn me no one can object to You about Your servant or question You regarding his plight!

segments.arabic: وَ قَدْ عَلِمْتُ أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ وَ لَا فِي نَقِمَتِكَ عَجَلَةٌ وَ إِنَّمَا يَعْجَلُ مَنْ يَخَافُ الْفَوْتَ وَ إِنَّمَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى الظُّلْمِ الضَّعِيفُ وَ قَدْ تَعَالَيْتَ عَنْ ذَلِكَ عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً
segments.translation: I know that there is no injustice in what You Decree, and there is no rush in Your sudden misfortunes, for only one who fears death rushes and one who is weak needs to resort to highhandedness; and indeed You are Sublime away from this! „Exalted and Great (beyond measure)!‟1Al-Isra 17:43

segments.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ انْصُرْنِي وَ اهْدِنِي وَ ارْحَمْنِي وَ آثِرْنِي وَ ارْزُقْنِي وَ
segments.translation: Please bestow Your Blessings on Muhammad and his Progeny (MGB). Please assist me, guide me and have Mercy upon me. Give me priority and provide for my sustenance.

segments.arabic: أَعِنِّي وَ اغْفِرْ لِي وَ تُبْ عَلَيَّ وَ اعْصِمْنِي وَ اسْتَجِبْ لِي فِي جَمِيعِ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ وَ أَرِدْهُ لِي وَ قَدِّرْهُ لِي وَ يَسِّرْهُ وَ امْضِهْ وَ بَارِكْ لِي فِيهِ
segments.translation: Please help me, forgive me and turn to me. Protect me and fulfill all that I ask You for. Please Will it, Destine it, Decree it and easily Sign and Bless it.

segments.arabic: وَ تَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ بِهِ وَ أَسْعِدْنِي بِمَا تُعْطِينِي مِنْهُ وَ زِدْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ الْوَاسِعِ سَعَةً مِنْ نِعَمِكَ الدَّائِمَةِ وَ أَوْصِلْ لِي ذَلِكَ كُلَّهُ بِخَيْرِ الْآخِرَةِ وَ نَعِيمِهَا يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ.
segments.translation: Please favor me with it and make me happy with what You give me, and give me more through Your Extensive Nobility and the plenty of Eternal Blessings near You. Please link that to the good and the bliss of the next world – O‟ the Most Compassionate, Most Merciful.”

segments.arabic: أَعْلَمُ أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَلى‌ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.translation: I know that Allah is capable of all things,

segments.arabic: وَ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ‌ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ‌
segments.translation: and there is no deity except Allah, the Lord of the great throne.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ فِي يَوْمِي هَذَا
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You in this day of mine,

segments.arabic: وَ فِي مَا قَبْلَهُ وَ فِيمَا بَعْدَهُ الْعَفْوَ
segments.translation: and in what preceded it, and in what will follow it for pardon,

segments.arabic: يَا خَيْرَ مَنِ اعْتَمَدَ عَلَيْهِ الْمُعْتَمِدُونَ
segments.translation: O Best of those relied upon by the reliers,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ قَصَدَهُ الْقَاصِدُونَ
segments.translation: and O Best of those intended by the intenders,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ هَرَبَ إِلَيْهِ الْهَارِبُونَ‌
segments.translation: and O Best of those fled to by the fleers,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ سَأَلَهُ السَّائِلُونَ
segments.translation: and O Best of those asked by the askers,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا خَيْرَ مَنْ جَادَ فِي الْمُجْتَدِيِنَ
segments.translation: and O Best of those generous among the strivers,

segments.arabic: وَ يَا خَيْرَ الرَّازِقِينَ وَ يَا ذَا الْقُوَّةِ الْمَتِينَ
segments.translation: and O Best of the providers, and O Possessor of the strong power,

segments.arabic: يَا وَلِيَّ الذَّاكِرِينَ يَا خَيْرَ الْمَسْئُولِينَ
segments.translation: O Guardian of those who remember, O Best of those asked.

segments.arabic: يَا مُنْقِذَ الْغَرْقَى يَا مُنْجِيَ الْهَلْكَى
segments.translation: O Rescuer of the drowning, O Saver of the perishing,

segments.arabic: يَا أَسْمَعَ السَّامِعِينَ وَ يَا أَبْصَرَ النَّاظِرِينَ
segments.translation: O Most Hearing of the hearers, O Most Seeing of the seers,

segments.arabic: يَا أَمَانَ الْخَائِفِينَ يَا صَرِيخَ الْمُسْتَصْرِخِينَ
segments.translation: O Safety of the fearful, O Cry of the callers,

segments.arabic: يَا مَلْجَأَ اللَّاجِينَ يَا رَازِقَ الْمُقِلِّينَ
segments.translation: O Refuge of the refugees, O Provider for the needy,

segments.arabic: يَا غَافِرَ ذُنُوبِ الْمُذْنِبِينَ يَا مُطْلِقَ الْمَسْجُونِينَ
segments.translation: O Forgiver of the sins of the sinners, O Releaser of the imprisoned,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْفُو عَنِ الْمُسِيئِينَ يَا زَائِدَ الشَّاكِرِينَ
segments.translation: O Pardoner of the wrongdoers, O Increaser of the grateful,

segments.arabic: يَا مُعَذِّبَ الْكَافِرِينَ يَا سَبِيلَ الصَّالِحِينَ
segments.translation: O Punisher of the disbelievers, O Way of the righteous,

segments.arabic: يَا أَعْلَمَ الْعَالِمِينَ يَا أَحْكَمَ الْحَاكِمِينَ
segments.translation: O Most Knowing of the knowers, O Most Just of the judges,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تُفْنِيهِ الدُّهُورُ وَ السِّنُونَ
segments.translation: O One whose ages and years do not wear out,

segments.arabic: يَا بَارّاً بِالْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَا جَارَ الْمُتَوَكِّلِينَ
segments.translation: O Benefactor of the believers, O Neighbor of those who trust,

segments.arabic: يَا قُدُّوساً فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ قُدُّوساً فِي الْأَرَضِينَ
segments.translation: O Holy in the heavens and Holy in the earths,

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيماً فِي الْعَالَمِينَ
segments.translation: O Great in the worlds,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَصْرِفُ الْبَلِيَّاتِ يَا مَنْ هُوَ عَالِمُ الْخَفِيَّاتِ
segments.translation: O One who averts calamities, O One who is knowledgeable of the hidden,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَأْتِي بِالْحَسَنَاتِ يَا مُنْزِلَ الْبَرَكَاتِ
segments.translation: O One who brings the good deeds, O Sender of the blessings,

segments.arabic: يَا رَبَّ السَّمَاوَاتِ يَا مُفَرِّجَ الْكُرُبَاتِ
segments.translation: O Lord of the heavens, O Reliever of distresses,

segments.arabic: يَا مُحْيِيَ الْأَمْوَاتِ يَا بَارِئَ النَّسَمَاتِ
segments.translation: O Reviver of the dead, O Creator of the breaths,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ لَا تَشْتَبِهُ عَلَيْهِ اللُّغَاتُ يَا مُعْطِيَ الْمَسْأَلَاتِ
segments.translation: O One to whom languages do not confuse, O Granter of requests,

segments.arabic: يَا قَابِلَ التَّوْبَاتِ يَا رَافِعَ الدَّرَجَاتِ
segments.translation: O Acceptor of repentances, O Elevator of degrees,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ خَضَعَتْ لِأَمْرِهِ الْأَمْوَاجُ الْمُتَلَاطِمَاتِ
segments.translation: O One to whom the raging waves submit,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ تُسَبِّحُهُ الْحِيتَانُ السَّابِحَاتُ
segments.translation: O One whom the swimming fish glorify,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ أَطَاعَتْهُ الرِّيَاحُ الْعَاصِفَاتُ
segments.translation: O One whom the stormy winds obey,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بِقُدْرَتِهِ [بِيَدِهِ‌] تَجْرِي الْجَوَارِ الْمُنْشَآتُ
segments.translation: O One by whose power [by His hand] the ships sail,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَسْمَعُ وَ يَرَى الْمُنَاجَاةَ
segments.translation: O One who hears and sees the intimate conversations,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ بِنِعْمَتِهِ تَتِمُّ الصَّالِحَاتُ
segments.translation: O One by whose favor the good deeds are completed,

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْمَنِّ وَ الْعَطِيَّاتِ
segments.translation: O Possessor of favor and gifts,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ جَلَّ عَنِ الصِّفَاتِ وَ عَظُمَ وَ تَعَالَى عَنِ الشُّبُهَاتِ
segments.translation: O One exalted above attributes and elevated above doubts,

segments.arabic: يَا مَنْ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي الْبَرِّ وَ الْبَحْرِ وَ الْفَلَوَاتِ
segments.translation: O One who knows what is on the land and in the sea and the voids,

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا الْفَضْلِ وَ الْكَرَامَاتِ
segments.translation: O Possessor of grace and miracles,

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الطَّاهِرِينَ
segments.translation: I ask You to send blessings upon Muhammad and the pure family of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَ تَغْفِرَ لِي مَغْفِرَةً عَزْماً جَزْماً لَا تُغَادِرُ لِي ذَنْباً
segments.translation: and to forgive me with a forgiveness determined, conclusive, leaving no sin behind

segments.arabic: وَ لَا تَكْتُبُ عَلَيَّ بَعْدَهَا حِسَاباً
segments.translation: and not writing against me any account thereafter,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَرْضَى عَنِّي فِي يَوْمِي هَذَا رِضًى لَا تَغْضَبُ عَلَيَّ بَعْدَهُ
segments.translation: and that You are pleased with me on this day with a pleasure after which You will not be angry with me,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِي وَ مَا تَأَخَّرَ
segments.translation: and that You forgive me what has preceded of my sin and what has delayed,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تَقِيَنِي مِنَ الْعَذَابِ الْأَدْنَى وَ مِنَ الْعَذَابِ الْأَكْبَرِ
segments.translation: and that You protect me from the lesser punishment and from the greater punishment,

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْ تُعْطِيَنِي قُوَّةً فِي عِبَادَتِكَ وَ بَصَراً فِي كِتَابِكَ
segments.translation: and that You grant me strength in Your worship, and insight in Your Book,

segments.arabic: وَ فِقْهاً فِي حُكْمِكَ وَ تُبَيِّضَ وَجْهِي بِنُورِكَ
segments.translation: and understanding in Your judgement, and that You whiten my face with Your light,

segments.arabic: وَ تَجْعَلَ رَاحَتِي فِي لِقَائِكَ وَ غِنَايَ فِي عَطَائِكَ
segments.translation: and make my comfort in meeting You, and my sufficiency in Your giving,

segments.arabic: وَ رَغْبَتِي فِيمَا عِنْدَكَ‌
segments.translation: and my desire in what is with You.

segments.arabic: إِنَّكَ عَلى‌ كُلِّ شَيْ‌ءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.translation: Indeed, You are capable of all things.

segments.arabic: وَ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَ سَلَّمَ.
segments.translation: And may Allah send blessings upon Muhammad and his pure family and grant peace.

_index_meta.title: Dua and Amaal for 2nd of the month of Ramadan
